meta.title: The daily word game
meta.description: Guess the hidden word in 6 tries (or less). A new puzzle is available each day!
meta.keywords: bèle fòòr, puzzle, word, play, game, online, guess, daily

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Fur. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Fur as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Fur. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Fur. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Fur. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Fur. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Fur. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Fur. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

word_detail.title: Wordle #{idx} — {date} — {word} | {langNative} Answer
word_detail.description_without_def: The Wordle {langNative} answer for {date} (#{idx}) was {word}. Can you guess it in 6 tries?

word_archive.title: Wordle {langNative} — All Words | Word Archive
word_archive.description: Browse all {count} past Wordle words in {langNative}. See definitions, AI art, and community stats for every daily word.

best_starting_words.title: Best Starting Words for Wordle in {langNative} — Wordle Global
best_starting_words.description: Data-driven analysis of the best starting words for Wordle in {langNative}. Ranked by letter coverage across {count} words.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Oi risolt il Wordle di vuê in {n} tentatîfs. Rivistu a fâ miôr?
text.share_challenge_lose: No oi rivât a risolvi il Wordle di vuê. Tu rivistu?
text.hard_mode_position: Modalitât dificile: {letter} al à di jessi in posizion {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Modalitât dificile: la tentative e à di contignî {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Definizion e art IA dopo il zûc
ui.install_app_desc: Zughe offline e oten la icone
ui.play_more_languages: Zughe plui lenghis par viodi lis statistichis globâls!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Zughe a Wordle ogni dì come une app
ui.no_games_yet: No tu âs ancjemò zuiât. Sielç une lenghe par scomençâ!
ui.easy_desc: Cualsisei peraule acetade, ancje se no je tal dizionari
ui.normal_desc: Lis tentativis a àn di jessi peraulis validis dal dizionari
ui.hard_desc: I indizis revelâts a àn di jessi doprâts tes tentativis sucesivis
ui.todays_word_reveal: La peraule di vuê — Zughe par scuvierzi!
ui.future_word: Cheste peraule no je stade ancjemò zuiade. Torne plui tart!
ui.daily_words_counting: peraulis ogni dì e in aument
ui.difficulty_locked: No si pues cambiâ la dificoltât dopo vê tentât
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_tagline: Il zûc di peraulis dal mont
ui.homepage_languages_counting: lenghis e in cressi — zontadis di regule.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — e di plui in rivâ.

seo.play_in_languages_sub: Dutis lis lenghis son gratis. Cence cont.
seo.footer: wordle.global — il zûc di peraulis ogni dì gratis in 80+ lenghis
seo.tile_correct: al è te peraule e tal puest just.
seo.tile_semicorrect: al è te peraule ma tal puest sbaliât.

value_props.title: 80+ lenghis
value_props.desc: Dal arap al yoruba. Il plui grant Wordle plurilengâl.

value_props.title: Definizions
value_props.desc: Impare il significât di ogni peraule dopo il zûc.

tips.title: Scomence cun vocâls
tips.text: CRANE o ADIEU a proedin letaris comunis.

tips.title: Dopre ce che tu sâs
tips.text: Vert = fix. Zâl = cambie posizion. Grîs = no.

tips.title: Parons comuns
tips.text: Ogni lenghe e à i siei parons.

tips.title: Eliminâ
tips.text: Il secont tentatîf al à di provâ letaris gnovis.

tips.title: Letaris dopplis
tips.text: Se nol cole, pense a une letare ripetude.

tips.title: Modalitât dificile
tips.text: Ti oblighe a doprâ i indizis confermâts.

tips_speed.title: CRANE
tips_speed.text: Letaris frequentis a dan la miôr probabilitât.

tips_speed.title: No sta pensâ masse
tips_speed.text: Speed Streak al premie la intuizion.

tips_speed.title: Protei il combo
tips_speed.text: Un faliment al romp il moltiplicadôr.

tips_speed.title: Finâls
tips_speed.text: Ricognessi i parons a spare seconts.

tips_speed.title: Stât calmo
tips_speed.text: Il cronometri al va plui svelt ogni 3 peraulis.

tips_multiboard.title: Lârc
tips_multiboard.text: Letaris comunis par cjapâ indizis su dutis lis taulis.

tips_multiboard.title: Tastiere dividude
tips_multiboard.text: Vert/grîs su taulis diversis ridûs lis opzions.

tips_multiboard.title: Taulis dificilis
tips_multiboard.text: Concentriti su la taule cun plui incogniis.

tips_multiboard.title: Letaris in comun
tips_multiboard.text: Dôs taulis cun E zâl? E in posizion gnove.

tips_multiboard.title: Salve un tentatîf
tips_multiboard.text: Un tentatîf in plui al fâs la diference.

seo.mode_desc_classic: 6 tentativis par indovinâ une peraule di 5 letaris. Indizis di colôr.
seo.mode_desc_speed: 3 minûts. Ogni peraule e da bonus di timp (+60s par 1, +10s par 6). Faliments: 30s. Combo fin a 3x. Plui svelt ogni 3 peraulis.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: {modeName}: {boardCount} taulis, {maxGuesses} tentativis. Ogni tentatîf su dutis. Risolvis a si blochin. Tastiere dividude.

faq.a: Sì. La stesse peraule par ducj.
Sì. Dutis lis modalitâts in 80+ lenghis.

unlimited.a: Zughe tantes voltis che tu vuelis.

howto.name: Lei i indizis
howto.text: Vert = just. Zâl = sbaliât. Grîs = no tal zûc.
